search:dotnet+ef-core:entity framework c.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `dotnet ef migrations add <MigrationName>`
  - `dotnet ef database update`
  - `dotnet ef migrations remove`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Entity Framework Core: 7.0 (as of my last update in October 2023)
  - Entity Framework Extensions: Check the official website for the latest version.

- **Key Config Options**:
  - Connection String: Define your database connection string in `appsettings.json`.
  - Migration History Table: Customize the name and schema of the migration history table using `MigrationsHistoryTable` option.
  - Migrations Folder: Specify a custom folder for migrations using `Scaffold-DbContext` or `Add-Migration`.

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `dotnet ef migrations add <MigrationName>`
  - `dotnet ef database update`
  - `dotnet ef migrations remove`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Entity Framework Core: [Check latest version on NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore/)
  - .NET SDK: [Check latest version on Microsoft website](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download)

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `DbContext` class configuration
  - Connection string in `appsettings.json`
  - Migration history table (`__EFMigrationsHistory`)
